title: psychotria micheliae
intro: Psychotria micheliae, also known as Michelia, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the leaves which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Michelia include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and potential antiviral properties, making it a subject of interest in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Michelia typically involve drying and processing the leaves to extract the alkaloids, which can be used in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
